ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., football, basketball, baseball) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the game belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season the game was played */,
  "home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of game event (e.g., kickoff, rush, pass) */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance to gain */,
  "yard_line" INTEGER /* Starting yard line */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained */,
  "end_yard_line" INTEGER /* Ending yard line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the event */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the event (e.g., rusher, passer, receiver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drives" (
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the drive belongs to */,
  "drive_index" INTEGER /* Index of the drive */,
  "play_index" INTEGER /* Index of the play within the drive */,
  "start_yard_line" INTEGER /* Starting yard line of the drive */,
  "end_yard_line" INTEGER /* Ending yard line of the drive */,
  "drive_result" TEXT /* Result of the drive (e.g., touchdown, turnover, punt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drives_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drive the play belongs to */,
  "play_index" INTEGER /* Index of the play */,
  "clock" TEXT /* Clock time of the play */,
  "wallclock" TEXT /* Wall clock time of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., rush, pass, punt) */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("drive_id") REFERENCES drives ("drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rush yards gained by the team */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Pass yards gained by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rush attempts by the player */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Rush yards gained by the player */,
  "pass_completions" INTEGER /* Number of pass completions by the player */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts by the player */,
  "pass_yards" INTEGER /* Pass yards gained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
